_note: Representative FTC redress shape for pipeline testing. Fields mirror what ftc.gov/exploredata exposes per case. Finalize the live export URL + selector against the real dashboard before enabling live discover.

cases.name: FTC v. Vonage — Junk-Fee Refunds
cases.payoutTerms: FTC redress; amount depends on fees paid
eligibility: I was charged by Vonage for a service I tried to cancel
I have not already received a refund for these charges

cases.name: FTC v. Benefytt — Deceptive Health Plan Refunds
cases.payoutTerms: pro rata by amount paid; not a fixed check
eligibility: I bought a Benefytt health plan or add-on product between 2017 and 2022

cases.name: FTC v. Credit Karma — Automatic Payments
